abort.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices were found. Add your Pivot device to ESPHome first.
abort.suffix_collision: Another Pivot entry already uses this device suffix.

error.cannot_read_device_name: Could not determine the ESPHome device name. Check the ESPHome integration logs.
error.device_not_found: The selected device could not be found in the device registry.
error.must_confirm_firmware: You must confirm the device is running Pivot firmware before continuing.
error.suffix_collision: This device suffix is already in use by another Pivot entry. Choose a different suffix.

user.title: Select your Pivot device
user.description: Choose the ESPHome device running Pivot firmware.

confirm.title: Confirm firmware and device suffix
confirm.description: Confirm that **{device_name}** is running Pivot firmware, then review the device suffix. The suffix is used to build entity IDs — it must match what the firmware expects.

data_description.device_suffix: Must match `device_suffix` in your firmware YAML exactly, e.g. `lounge` or `ha_voice_1`

options.title: Announcement settings
options.description: Optionally configure a text-to-speech service and speaker for spoken announcements. These settings can be changed at any time via the integration options.

data_description.tts_entity: Used for bank change announcements, triple-press re-announcements, and value announcements. Also shared with the Timer blueprint automatically.
data_description.media_player_entity: The speaker used for all spoken announcements.
data_description.announcements: When on, Pivot announces the bank name when you switch banks and re-announces the assigned entity on triple press. Requires TTS and media player to be configured. Per-bank value announcements are controlled separately via the Announce Value switches.

banks_initial.title: Assign entities to banks
banks_initial.description: Choose which entity each bank controls. You can change these later via the integration options.

data_description.timer_banks: Timers are an optional add-on feature. Select which bank should act as a timer — that bank's entity assignment is ignored and it will be controlled by the Pivot — Timer blueprint instead. See the Pivot docs for timer setup instructions.

init.title: Announcement settings
init.description: Configure spoken announcements. When enabled, Pivot announces the bank name on bank change and re-announces the assigned entity on triple press. Per-bank value announcements are controlled separately via the Announce Value switches.

data_description.tts_entity: Used for bank change announcements, triple-press re-announcements, and value announcements. Also shared with the Timer blueprint automatically.
data_description.media_player_entity: The speaker used for all spoken announcements.
data_description.announcements: When on, Pivot announces the bank name when you switch banks and re-announces the assigned entity on triple press. Requires TTS and media player to be configured. Per-bank value announcements are controlled separately via the Announce Value switches.

banks.title: Assign entities to banks
banks.description:
Choose which entity each bank controls. All banks are optional — leave any empty to skip it.

**How it works:** in Control Mode, turn the knob to adjust the entity (brightness, volume, fan speed, temperature, etc.) and press the button to toggle it on/off.

**Scenes & scripts** activate on button press only — the knob has no effect for those.

data_description.timer_banks: Timers are an optional add-on feature. Select which bank should act as a timer — that bank's entity assignment is ignored and it will be controlled by the Pivot — Timer blueprint instead. See the Pivot docs for timer setup instructions.
